016package edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.dao;
017
018import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
019import androidx.room.Dao;
020import androidx.room.Delete;
021import androidx.room.Insert;
022import androidx.room.Query;
023import androidx.room.Update;
024import edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.entity.Pixel;
025import java.util.Collection;
026import java.util.List;
027
028/**
029 * Data Access Object (DAO) interface for {@link Pixel} entity. Declares CRUD operations
030 * for managing individual pixel data within layers.
031 */
032@Dao
033public interface PixelDao {
034
035  /**
036   * Inserts a single pixel into the database.
037   *
038   * @param pixel Pixel instance to insert.
039   * @return ID of the newly inserted pixel.
040   */
041  @Insert
042  long insert(Pixel pixel);
043
044  /**
045   * Inserts multiple pixels into the database.
046   *
047   * @param pixels Collection of pixels to insert.
048   * @return List of IDs of the newly inserted pixels.
049   */
050  @Insert
051  List<Long> insert(Collection<Pixel> pixels);
052
053  /**
054   * Inserts multiple pixels into the database.
055   *
056   * @param pixels Variable number of pixels to insert.
057   * @return List of IDs of the newly inserted pixels.
058   */
059  @Insert
060  List<Long> insert(Pixel... pixels);
061
062  /**
063   * Updates an existing pixel in the database.
064   *
065   * @param pixel Pixel instance with updated values.
066   * @return Number of rows updated.
067   */
068  @Update
069  int update(Pixel pixel);
070
071  /**
072   * Updates multiple existing pixels in the database.
073   *
074   * @param pixels Variable number of pixels with updated values.
075   * @return Number of rows updated.
076   */
077  @Update
078  int update(Pixel... pixels);
079
080  /**
081   * Deletes a pixel from the database.
082   *
083   * @param pixel Pixel instance to delete.
084   * @return Number of rows deleted.
085   */
086  @Delete
087  int delete(Pixel pixel);
088
089  /**
090   * Deletes multiple pixels from the database.
091   *
092   * @param pixels Variable number of pixels to delete.
093   * @return Number of rows deleted.
094   */
095  @Delete
096  int delete(Pixel... pixels);
097
098  /**
099   * Retrieves a pixel by its ID.
100   *
101   * @param pixelId Pixel ID.
102   * @return LiveData containing the pixel, or {@code null} if not found.
103   */
104  @Query("SELECT * FROM pixel WHERE pixel_id = :pixelId")
105  LiveData<Pixel> select(long pixelId);
106
107  /**
108   * Retrieves all pixels for a specific layer.
109   *
110   * @param layerId Layer ID.
111   * @return LiveData containing a list of pixels for the specified layer.
112   */
113  @Query("SELECT * FROM pixel WHERE layer_id = :layerId ORDER BY y_coordinate ASC, x_coordinate ASC")
114  LiveData<List<Pixel>> selectByLayer(long layerId);
115
116  /**
117   * Retrieves a specific pixel at the given coordinates within a layer.
118   *
119   * @param layerId Layer ID.
120   * @param x X coordinate.
121   * @param y Y coordinate.
122   * @return LiveData containing the pixel at the specified position, or {@code null} if not found.
123   */
124  @Query("SELECT * FROM pixel WHERE layer_id = :layerId AND x_coordinate = :x AND y_coordinate = :y")
125  LiveData<Pixel> selectByCoordinates(long layerId, int x, int y);
126
127  /**
128   * Retrieves pixels within a specific rectangular region of a layer.
129   *
130   * @param layerId Layer ID.
131   * @param minX Minimum X coordinate.
132   * @param maxX Maximum X coordinate.
133   * @param minY Minimum Y coordinate.
134   * @param maxY Maximum Y coordinate.
135   * @return LiveData containing a list of pixels within the specified region.
136   */
137  @Query("SELECT * FROM pixel WHERE layer_id = :layerId AND x_coordinate BETWEEN :minX AND :maxX AND y_coordinate BETWEEN :minY AND :maxY")
138  LiveData<List<Pixel>> selectByRegion(long layerId, int minX, int maxX, int minY, int maxY);
139
140  /**
141   * Retrieves all pixels of a specific color within a layer.
142   *
143   * @param layerId Layer ID.
144   * @param colorValue Color value to search for.
145   * @return LiveData containing a list of pixels with the specified color.
146   */
147  @Query("SELECT * FROM pixel WHERE layer_id = :layerId AND color_value = :colorValue")
148  LiveData<List<Pixel>> selectByColor(long layerId, int colorValue);
149
150  /**
151   * Gets the count of pixels in a specific layer.
152   *
153   * @param layerId Layer ID.
154   * @return LiveData containing the number of pixels in the layer.
155   */
156  @Query("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pixel WHERE layer_id = :layerId")
157  LiveData<Integer> countByLayer(long layerId);
158
159  /**
160   * Updates the color value of a specific pixel.
161   *
162   * @param pixelId Pixel ID.
163   * @param colorValue New color value.
164   * @return Number of rows updated.
165   */
166  @Query("UPDATE pixel SET color_value = :colorValue, last_modified = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE pixel_id = :pixelId")
167  int updateColor(long pixelId, int colorValue);
168
169  /**
170   * Updates or inserts a pixel at specific coordinates (upsert operation).
171   * Deletes existing pixel and returns 0, or returns 0 if no pixel exists.
172   *
173   * @param layerId Layer ID.
174   * @param x X coordinate.
175   * @param y Y coordinate.
176   * @return Number of rows deleted (for existing pixel).
177   */
178  @Query("DELETE FROM pixel WHERE layer_id = :layerId AND x_coordinate = :x AND y_coordinate = :y")
179  int deleteByCoordinates(long layerId, int x, int y);
180
181  /**
182   * Deletes all pixels in a specific layer.
183   *
184   * @param layerId Layer ID.
185   * @return Number of rows deleted.
186   */
187  @Query("DELETE FROM pixel WHERE layer_id = :layerId")
188  int deleteByLayer(long layerId);
189
190  /**
191   * Deletes all pixels of a specific color within a layer.
192   *
193   * @param layerId Layer ID.
194   * @param colorValue Color value to delete.
195   * @return Number of rows deleted.
196   */
197  @Query("DELETE FROM pixel WHERE layer_id = :layerId AND color_value = :colorValue")
198  int deleteByColor(long layerId, int colorValue);
199}
